requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Compulsory Product Certification for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO 光伏逆变器强制产品认证
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO 光伏逆變器強制產品認證

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters sold in Brazil must obtain compulsory INMETRO certification (Certificacao Compulsoria de Produtos) before market placement. The applicable regulatory instrument is Portaria INMETRO no. 140/2022 (effective 2 May 2022, superseding Portaria 004/2011; updated by Portaria 515/2023 adding arc-fault and power-tolerance requirements). Scope: inverters up to 75 kW (on-grid, off-grid, hybrid); inverters above 75 kW are currently out of scope. Enforcement deadlines: all inverters up to 10 kW by May 2024; 10–75 kW by May 2025 — both deadlines have now passed and enforcement is active. Certification must be obtained through an INMETRO-accredited OCP (Organismo de Certificacao de Produtos) and a valid Brazilian certificate must be held prior to importation.
summary.zh: 在巴西销售的并网光伏逆变器须在进入市场前取得INMETRO强制产品认证（Certificacao Compulsoria de Produtos）。适用法规为INMETRO第140/2022号部令（2022年5月2日起生效，取代第004/2011号部令；2023年第515号部令进一步更新，新增弧故障及功率容差要求）。适用范围：75千瓦及以下逆变器（并网、离网、混合型）；75千瓦以上逆变器暂不在范围内。执法截止日期：10千瓦以下于2024年5月到期，10–75千瓦于2025年5月到期，两个截止日期均已过，法规现已强制执行。认证须通过INMETRO认可的OCP机构办理，进口前须持有有效的巴西认证证书。
summary.zht: 在巴西銷售的並網光伏逆變器須在進入市場前取得INMETRO強制產品認證（Certificacao Compulsoria de Produtos）。適用法規為INMETRO第140/2022號部令（2022年5月2日起生效，取代第004/2011號部令；2023年第515號部令進一步更新，新增弧故障及功率容差要求）。適用範圍：75千瓦及以下逆變器（並網、離網、混合型）；75千瓦以上逆變器暫不在範圍內。執法截止日期：10千瓦以下於2024年5月到期，10–75千瓦於2025年5月到期，兩個截止日期均已過，法規現已強制執行。認證須通過INMETRO認可的OCP機構辦理，進口前須持有有效的巴西認證證書。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO no. 140/2022 (confirmed current instrument; effective 2 May 2022; superseded Portaria 004/2011; updated by Portaria 515/2023)
Lei no. 9.933/1999 (establishes INMETRO compulsory certification framework)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters typically hold GB/T 37408 (grid-tied PV inverter performance standard) and IEC 62109-1/-2 (safety of power converters for PV systems) obtained via the CB Scheme. Some also carry CQC voluntary certification. These Chinese or CB certificates are not directly accepted by INMETRO; a separate Brazilian certification process is required.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器通常持有GB/T 37408（并网光伏逆变器性能标准）及通过CB互认体系获取的IEC 62109-1/-2（光伏系统用电力变换器安全标准）认证，部分产品还持有CQC自愿性认证。上述中国或CB证书不被INMETRO直接认可，须另行办理巴西认证。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器通常持有GB/T 37408（並網光伏逆變器性能標準）及通過CB互認體系取得的IEC 62109-1/-2（光伏系統用電力變換器安全標準）認證，部分產品亦持有CQC自願性認證。上述中國或CB證書不被INMETRO直接認可，須另行辦理巴西認證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 — Safety of power converters for use in PV power systems (Part 1: General requirements)
IEC 62109-2:2011 — Safety of power converters for use in PV power systems (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters)

gap.en: CB Scheme certificates and CE marking are NOT accepted as equivalents for INMETRO certification. A dedicated Brazilian certification via an INMETRO-accredited OCP is mandatory. CB test reports may be leveraged to reduce re-testing scope depending on the OCP, but the Brazilian certificate must be obtained independently.
gap.zh: CB互认体系证书及CE标志不被视为等同于INMETRO认证，无法直接替代。须通过INMETRO认可的OCP机构单独申请巴西认证。根据OCP要求，CB测试报告或可减少重复测试范围，但巴西认证证书须独立取得。
gap.zht: CB互認體系證書及CE標誌不被視為等同於INMETRO認證，無法直接替代。須通過INMETRO認可的OCP機構單獨申請巴西認證。根據OCP要求，CB測試報告或可減少重複測試範圍，但巴西認證證書須獨立取得。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compulsory certification required before sale or importation into Brazil
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 37408 is a recommended standard; IEC 62109 via CB is market-driven)

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PV inverters require a separate, dedicated INMETRO compulsory certification to enter the Brazilian market. Existing CB or CE certificates cannot substitute. Engage an INMETRO-accredited OCP early in the export timeline — typical certification duration is 6–9 months. Portaria 140/2022 (confirmed, active, enforcement deadlines now passed) covers inverters up to 75 kW; inverters above 75 kW are currently out of scope. [Informational only — verify scope with INMETRO or a Brazilian OCP before acting.]
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国光伏逆变器进入巴西市场须单独取得INMETRO强制认证，现有CB或CE证书无法替代。建议在出口计划早期即委托INMETRO认可的OCP机构启动认证——典型认证周期为6至9个月。第140/2022号部令（已确认，现行有效，执法截止日期均已过）覆盖75千瓦及以下逆变器；75千瓦以上逆变器目前不在适用范围内。【仅供参考——采取行动前请向INMETRO或巴西OCP机构核实适用范围。】
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國光伏逆變器進入巴西市場須單獨取得INMETRO強制認證，現有CB或CE證書無法替代。建議在出口計劃早期即委託INMETRO認可的OCP機構啟動認證——典型認證週期為6至9個月。第140/2022號部令（已確認，現行有效，執法截止日期均已過）覆蓋75千瓦及以下逆變器；75千瓦以上逆變器目前不在適用範圍內。【僅供參考——採取行動前請向INMETRO或巴西OCP機構核實適用範圍。】

requirement_topic.zh: 在INMETRO认可的巴西实验室进行测试
requirement_topic.zht: 在INMETRO認可的巴西實驗室進行測試

summary.en: Product testing for INMETRO certification must generally be conducted by laboratories accredited by CGCRE (Coordenacao Geral de Acreditacao), INMETRO's accreditation body. Some OCPs may accept test reports from ILAC-recognised foreign laboratories on a case-by-case basis, but this is at the OCP's discretion and not a guaranteed path. Industry sources confirm this discretion exists in practice, but it is not a codified right — confirm with your chosen OCP before shipping samples.
summary.zh: INMETRO认证所需的产品测试通常须由INMETRO下属认可机构CGCRE（认可总协调部）认可的实验室执行。部分OCP机构可能根据具体情况接受ILAC认可的境外实验室出具的测试报告，但此项由OCP自行决定，并非保证可行的路径。业界资料证实此自由裁量权在实践中存在，但并非法定权利——寄送样品前请向所选OCP机构确认。
summary.zht: INMETRO認證所需的產品測試通常須由INMETRO下屬認可機構CGCRE（認可總協調部）認可的實驗室執行。部分OCP機構可能根據具體情況接受ILAC認可的境外實驗室出具的測試報告，但此項由OCP自行決定，並非保證可行的路徑。業界資料證實此自由裁量權在實踐中存在，但並非法定權利——寄送樣品前請向所選OCP機構確認。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC 62109-1 (Brazilian adoption of IEC 62109-1:2010 — exact ABNT edition year not publicly confirmable without ABNT catalog access; cited in ABNT NBR 16690:2019 and industry test reports)
ABNT NBR IEC 62109-2 (Brazilian adoption of IEC 62109-2:2011 — exact ABNT edition year not publicly confirmable without ABNT catalog access; cited in ABNT NBR 16690:2019 and industry test reports)

summary.en: In China, testing for IEC 62109 certification under the CB Scheme is performed at CBTL-designated laboratories (e.g., CESI, TUV Rheinland China, SGS China). These labs are ILAC members but are not CGCRE-accredited. Their reports may assist in INMETRO certification but do not automatically satisfy the Brazilian testing requirement.
summary.zh: 在中国，CB互认体系下IEC 62109认证测试由CBTL指定实验室（如中国电科院、莱茵技术中国、SGS中国等）执行。这些实验室为ILAC成员，但未获CGCRE认可，其报告或可辅助INMETRO认证申请，但不自动满足巴西的测试要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，CB互認體系下IEC 62109認證測試由CBTL指定實驗室（如中國電科院、萊茵技術中國、SGS中國等）執行。這些實驗室為ILAC成員，但未獲CGCRE認可，其報告或可輔助INMETRO認證申請，但不自動滿足巴西的測試要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 (tested via CB Scheme at CBTL-designated labs)
IEC 62109-2:2011 (tested via CB Scheme at CBTL-designated labs)

gap.en: Chinese lab test reports (even from ILAC-member labs) are not automatically accepted for INMETRO certification. Testing in, or witnessed by, a CGCRE-accredited lab is typically required. Chinese exporters should confirm with their chosen OCP whether existing CB test reports can reduce re-testing scope.
gap.zh: 中国实验室出具的测试报告（即使来自ILAC成员实验室）不被自动接受用于INMETRO认证。通常须在CGCRE认可实验室进行测试或由其见证。中国出口商应向所选OCP机构确认，现有CB测试报告能否缩减重新测试范围。
gap.zht: 中國實驗室出具的測試報告（即使來自ILAC成員實驗室）不被自動接受用於INMETRO認證。通常須在CGCRE認可實驗室進行測試或由其見證。中國出口商應向所選OCP機構確認，現有CB測試報告能否縮減重新測試範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CGCRE-accredited laboratory involvement required for INMETRO certification
mandatory_status.cn: Required for CB Scheme (CBTL-designated labs); not equivalent to CGCRE accreditation

source.publisher: INMETRO CGCRE — Coordenacao Geral de Acreditacao

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan for laboratory testing in Brazil or at a CGCRE-accredited facility. Existing Chinese CB test reports may reduce scope but cannot fully replace Brazilian lab requirements. Confirm OCP-specific rules before shipping samples. [Informational only — verify current ABNT NBR standard numbers and OCP policies before acting.]
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须在巴西或CGCRE认可的设施进行实验室测试。现有中国CB测试报告或可减少测试范围，但不能完全替代巴西实验室要求。发运样品前请向OCP确认具体规则。【仅供参考——采取行动前请核实现行ABNT NBR标准编号及OCP政策。】
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須在巴西或CGCRE認可的設施進行實驗室測試。現有中國CB測試報告或可減少測試範圍，但不能完全替代巴西實驗室要求。發運樣品前請向OCP確認具體規則。【僅供參考——採取行動前請核實現行ABNT NBR標準編號及OCP政策。】

requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Seal (Mark of Conformity) on Product and Packaging
requirement_topic.zh: 产品及包装须贴附INMETRO合格标志（印章）
requirement_topic.zht: 產品及包裝須貼附INMETRO合格標誌（印章）

summary.en: Once certified, PV inverters must bear the official INMETRO seal (Marca de Conformidade INMETRO) on the product and/or packaging before sale in Brazil. Use of the seal without a valid certificate is prohibited. The OCP issues the certificate and authorises seal use; the certificate number must be traceable. General seal usage rules are governed by Portaria INMETRO 274/2014 and RGCP (Portaria 200/2021); the seal must be applied solely next to the item it refers to, with written authorisation from INMETRO DCONF. Specific placement dimensions for a given product may be defined in the product-specific RAC (Regulamento de Avaliacao da Conformidade) — confirm exact requirements with your OCP.
summary.zh: 取得认证后，光伏逆变器在巴西销售前须在产品及/或包装上贴附INMETRO官方合格标志（Marca de Conformidade INMETRO）。未持有效证书擅自使用标志属违法行为。证书由OCP机构签发，授权使用标志，且证书编号须可追溯。通用印章使用规则由第274/2014号部令及RGCP（第200/2021号部令）规定，印章须仅贴附于其所指向的具体产品项目旁，并须取得INMETRO DCONF书面授权。具体产品的标贴位置及尺寸可能在产品专项合规评估规定（RAC）中另有规定——具体要求请向OCP确认。
summary.zht: 取得認證後，光伏逆變器在巴西銷售前須在產品及/或包裝上貼附INMETRO官方合格標誌（Marca de Conformidade INMETRO）。未持有效證書擅自使用標誌屬違法行為。證書由OCP機構簽發，授權使用標誌，且證書編號須可追溯。通用印章使用規則由第274/2014號部令及RGCP（第200/2021號部令）規定，印章須僅貼附於其所指向的具體產品項目旁，並須取得INMETRO DCONF書面授權。具體產品的標貼位置及尺寸可能在產品專項合規評估規定（RAC）中另有規定——具體要求請向OCP確認。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO no. 140/2022 (confirmed; updated by Portaria 515/2023) — defines compulsory certification requirements for PV inverters up to 75 kW

Portaria INMETRO no. 200/2021 (RGCP — Requisitos Gerais de Certificacao de Produtos) — current general product-certification requirements framework, superseded earlier RGCP portarias (118/2015, 250/2016, 252/2016, 176/2017); confirmed in force

Portaria INMETRO no. 274/2014 — current general rules for use of INMETRO conformity identification seals/marks (confirmed in force; not revoked by Portaria 200/2021). NOTE: any reference to 'Portaria 301/2012' for general seal rules is an ERROR — Portaria 301/2011 is an automotive-components instrument; it does not govern general conformity mark usage.

summary.en: Chinese products certified under the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme must bear the CCC mark. PV inverters exported to Brazil do not require CCC, but familiarity with mandatory-mark requirements makes the INMETRO seal concept directly analogous. The CE mark used for European markets has no legal equivalence in Brazil.
summary.zh: 通过中国强制认证（3C认证）的中国产品须贴附CCC标志。出口巴西的光伏逆变器无需CCC认证，但强制标志的概念与INMETRO印章直接类比。用于欧洲市场的CE标志在巴西不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 通過中國強制認證（3C認證）的中國產品須貼附CCC標誌。出口巴西的光伏逆變器無需CCC認證，但強制標誌的概念與INMETRO印章直接類比。用於歐洲市場的CE標誌在巴西不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) mark — domestic China analogue (not applicable for Brazil export)
CE marking — EU conformity mark (not recognised in Brazil)

gap.en: CCC marks and CE marks have no legal validity in Brazil. Only the INMETRO seal — obtained through a Brazilian OCP after testing and certification — is accepted. Packaging and product labels must be updated for the Brazilian market to include the INMETRO seal and certificate reference number.
gap.zh: CCC标志及CE标志在巴西不具法律效力。只有通过巴西OCP机构完成测试和认证后获得的INMETRO印章方为有效。产品和包装标签须针对巴西市场进行更新，加注INMETRO印章及证书参考编号。
gap.zht: CCC標誌及CE標誌在巴西不具法律效力。只有通過巴西OCP機構完成測試和認證後獲得的INMETRO印章方為有效。產品和包裝標籤須針對巴西市場進行更新，加注INMETRO印章及證書參考編號。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO seal required on all certified products before sale in Brazil
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for export (CCC mark is domestic China only; CE is for EU only)

source.url_note: Parent INMETRO conformity-assessment page (confirmed live). Primary legal instruments: Portaria 274/2014 (seal rules, http://www.inmetro.gov.br/legislacao/rtac/pdf/rtac002120.pdf) and Portaria 200/2021 RGCP (gov.br/inmetro/pt-br/assuntos/regulamentacao/produtos-e-servicos-regulados/documentos/rtac002753.pdf).
source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Budget for label and packaging redesign for the Brazilian market to include the INMETRO seal and certificate number. The seal may only be applied after a valid OCP certificate is issued — seal placement rules are governed by Portaria 274/2014 and RGCP (Portaria 200/2021). CE and CCC marks provide no Brazilian regulatory recognition. [Informational only — verify current seal placement rules with your OCP before printing packaging.]
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须为巴西市场预算标签及包装重新设计费用，以加注INMETRO印章和证书编号。仅在OCP机构签发有效证书后方可贴附印章——印章标贴规则由第274/2014号部令及RGCP（第200/2021号部令）规定。CE及CCC标志在巴西无监管认可效力。【仅供参考——印制包装前请向OCP确认现行印章标贴规则。】
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須為巴西市場預算標籤及包裝重新設計費用，以加注INMETRO印章和證書編號。僅在OCP機構簽發有效證書後方可貼附印章——印章標貼規則由第274/2014號部令及RGCP（第200/2021號部令）規定。CE及CCC標誌在巴西無監管認可效力。【僅供參考——印製包裝前請向OCP確認現行印章標貼規則。】
